name: Yoshiyuki Hatori
description: Hatori, also known as Tori, is 28 years old and an editor in the Emerald department. Although in the beginning he is serious and reserved, we later learn that he has harbored both deep and secret feelings for his childhood friend Chiaki. After kissing him and confessing his love, Hatori pulls away fearing that Chiaki doesn't feel the same, but instead loves his rival, Yanase. Although Chiaki does somewhat have the same feelings, unbeknownst to Tori. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Yuji Takehisa
description: The strongest delinquent of Hekikuu high, previously expelled for beating up one of the teachers: after being defeated by Kitano, he proclaims himself his "little brother". He sports spiked bleached hair and has no eyebrows. After claiming loyalty to Kitano, he becomes less delinquent-like. He doesn't get into a lot of fights anymore (although he doesn't lose any of his fighting skill), nor does he skip classes, staying calm most of the time. His old, hot-blooded self, comes to the surface when

name: Yune
description: Yune is a girl from Japan who is brought to Paris by Claude's grandfather to serve in their families' metal crafts shop due to reasons that have yet to be fully explained. She spends her time in the Galerie du Roy, the shopping arcade the shop is located in, becoming the store's "shop girl" and attracting customers as she adapts to the different lifestyle of the French.

name: Yuu Fujikura
description: A maid of the Arima household who sometimes councils Teppei. She had been in an orphanage from a very tender age until Isshin Arima took her in his care and brought her up to be an admirable maid. She has sworn to serve the Arima family to show her gratitude. She feels being privileged to be assigned as the maid-in-charge to serve Teppei, the next heir to the Arima Group.

name: Zaryusu Shasha
nativeName: ザリュース・シャシャ
description: Zaryusu Shasha is a lizardman of the Green Claw Tribe, and he's the younger brother of its chieftain, Shasuryu Shasha. His scales are dark green and black charcoal in color. A very wise individual, he is also regarded as the strongest lizardman and he is the wielder of the magical blade Frost Pain, one of the few precious treasures the lizardmen possess. Zaryusu is a traveler, which is the name given to a lizardman who left the village in order to explore the outside world, and has a crimson bra
searchTerms: ザリュース・シャシャ

name: Zeon Bell
description: Zeon (Zeno in the English version) is a mamono who looks exactly like Gash Bell, save for his pastier colors and purple eyes. His spells are the same as Gash's, only more powerful; additionally, Zeon does not lose consciousness during the spells and thus knows what he is doing while they are being cast. His cloak also has magical abilities, allowing him to protect himself and his bookkeeper if he gets in trouble, and to teleport himself and his bookkeeper to another location. He is very powerful

name: Aka no Jou
description: A majestic scarlet red dragon goddess and a regular at Nekoya. She is always seen visiting Nekoya during closing hour when it is empty to order her favorite food, beef stew. She considers Nekoya and all the staff there to be a part of her clan and will protect them from all harm.

name: Akari Inuyama
description: Younger sister of [Aoi Inuyama](https://anilist.co/character/124577/).

name: Akira Kaburagi Regendorf
nativeName: 暁・鏑木・レーゲンドルフ
description: Akira is a werewolf and a member of the Earth Clan which protects the Tepes vampire family. He is the personal guardian of Mina Tepes. Growing up in the world of humans, Akira met Mina as a child and became strongly attached to her, making her a promise to always protect her. Because of his werewolf powers, he has incredible resistance to physical harm and amazing regenerative abilities, in addition to fierce raw strength. After vampires are revealed to the world and he is forced into protecting

name: Akira Komi
description: Akira Komi is Shousuke and Shouko's cousin. She was originally scared of Shouko before because of Shouko's inability to speak and constant staring at Akira silently. The two become close during her Udon festival visit after Shouko tickled her.

name: Ako no Haha
description: Mrs. Tamaki is the mother of Ako Tamaki from the Netoge no Yome wa Onnanoko ja Nai to Omotta? series. Mrs. Tamaki is a very kind and understanding mother, supporting Ako's desire to play games, but wants her to make friends in school. Mrs. Tamaki can be easily too trusting or understanding as she let Ako continue to believe she has a 'husband' and letting Hideki, a teenage boy, to have the key to her daughter's room and their house. nativeName: アルフィノ・ルヴェユール
description: The older twin brother of Alisaie. Alphinaud, like his sister, is somewhat full of himself, especially when first getting to know him. Despite this, he knows his role and gets the job done, thanks to his wits and clever plans. He and Alisaie often fight among each other, when Alphinaud makes a comment and Alisaie threatens violence against him in turn. name: Aoi Hinata
description: Aoi Hinata is the owner of [Kyuu-chan](https://anilist.co/character/141166/Kyuu) and takes care of him. Hinata has dark lavender-pink-like colored hair. His hair is large especially in proportions to his head and body, messy in style. Hinata appears gloomy to many people around him, a fact that makes him somewhat self-conscious. name: Ayaka Tachikawa
description: **Hometown:** Tokyo **Motto:** Others are others, I am myself. Youngest of three sisters. Her older sisters have caused her to be a bit more philosophical. She forges her own path and remains unaffected by others. She has a strong will, but also has a side that looks out after others. She is the most charismatic one of the group. (Source: Official Website)

name: Bernadetta von Varley
nativeName: ベルナデッタ＝フォン＝ヴァーリ
description: “_I'm just gonna hide in the fort and cheer everyone on. There, um, is a fort, right?_” — Bernadetta __Bernadetta von Varley__ (pronounced /ˌbɝnə'dɛtə vɒn 'vɑɹli/[key]; Japanese: ベルナデッタ＝フォン＝ヴァーリ _Bernadetta von Varley_) is a playable character appearing in _Fire Emblem: Three Houses_. She is a student at the Officers Academy and a member of the Black Eagles. (Source: [Fire Emblem Wiki](https://fireemblemwiki.org/wiki/Bernadetta))

name: Blaze The Cat
description: An anthropomorphic cat from an alternate dimension, where she is both the imperial princess of the Sol Empire who has the right to inherit the throne, and the appointed guardian of the Sol Emeralds, a role similar to that of Sonic and Knuckles combined and that of a shrine maiden, although she appears too busy for such an admirable position as the latter. name: Blind Girl
description: A blind cursed child abandoned by her mother. Because she has no sight, humans mistreat her by "donating" things other than coins (pull-tabs, rocks, etc.).

name: Bloody Mary
nativeName: ブラッディ・メアリー
description: Born in England, Bloody is a 400-year-old vampire who doesn't remember his past and who wants to die. However, he isn't a typical vampire. He can walk in the daylight, which is why he is searching for Maria, an exorcist, to kill him.

name: Boris Airay
description: Boris is the counterpart of the Cheshire Cat; like the character he is based on, Boris loves riddles. He has functional cat ears and a tail, several piercings and tattoos, and dresses in short, exposing outfits with a pink boa and a collar with a chain. Boris works in the Amusement Park District for Mary Gowland. Though he is sly, devious character with a childish persona, he becomes close to Alice.
